subcodes.first_line: God willing, mayest thou be rendered joyous and adorned in this spiritual springtime by the vernal showers of the All-Merciful's loving-kindness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انشاء الله در این بهار روحانی از باران نیسان رحمت رحمانی خرم و مزین باشی ای
subcodes.subjects: @the soul as soil; cultivation of the soul, @self-improvement; self-perfection; discipline, @Manifestation of God as gardener; cultivator, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
